title: FishingSim
description: Datapack and mod that aims to add more fishing loot
body:
# FishingSim

### **DISCLAIMER**: This mod **doesn't add** any **entities**, **just items** from fishing

**If you want to use the mod version for fabric you need to install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

Are you bored of regular fishing?, Do you want more loot?, - This datapack adds new types of fish- and treasure to fishing, so its more enjoyable. Add this datapack to your world so you'll fish more and get more rewards for fishing!


<details>
<summary>New Fishing Loot</summary>

### New Fishing Loot:
    Fish:
      - Carp
      - Sardine
      - Anchovy
      - Herring
      - Catfish
      - Tuna
      - Bream
      - Pike
      - Slimefish
      - Perch
      - Eel
      - Sculker
      - Anglerfish
      - Flying Fish
      - Tench
      - Sunfish
      - Blobfish
      - Sterlet
      - Brown Bullhead
      - Endfish
      - Void Eel
      - Goldfish
      - Sea Horse
    Treasure:
      - Coast Armor Trim
      - Tide Armor Trim
      - Treasure Chest
      - Iron Nugget
      - Gold Nugget
      - Fish Barrel
    Junk:
      - Seagrass
      - Rubber Duck
      - Armadillo Scute (only in savanna and badlands biomes)

</details>



use /function fishingsim:fish to get all the new fish added

### After Beta 1.0 the resourcepack is **!!! REQUIRED !!!**

Credit to my friend for the textures:
**@a_cshbotond** on instagram
